Represents a CenterlineDrillTurningBuilder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetCycleTrackingPoint()` | `unsafe string` | Returns the cycle tracking pointMore... |
| `SetCycleTrackingPoint(string name)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the cycle tracking pointMore... |
| `GetHoleAxisValues()` | `unsafe double []` | Get the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `SetHoleAxisValues(double [] holeAxis)` | `unsafe void` | Set the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemBuilder(string name)` | `unsafeNXOpen.TaggedObject` | Returns the customizable item builder for the given customizable item nameMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

## NXOpen.CAM.GeneralPropertiesBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a45104.html

Represents aNXOpen.CAM.GeneralPropertiesBuilderto be used for setting the name of a specified CAM object

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `Information()` | `unsafe void` | Lists the object information to the listing windowMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a45364.html

Collision Avoidance Dialog builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `DoCollisionAvoidance()` | `unsafe void` | Updates selected paths.More... |
| `GetSelectedOps()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the selected operations.More... |
| `SetSelectedOps(string [] selectedOps)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the selected operations.More... |
| `UpdateSimDisplayOptions()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the Sim Display Options to match changes made in the Collision Avoidance DialogMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `ChangeApproachRetract[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to change approach and retract distances to avoid collisionsMore... |
| `ChangeProbeAngles[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to change probe angles to avoid collisionsMore... |
| `ChangeProbeTip[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to change probe tip to avoid collisionsMore... |
| `ClearanceDistance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the transition clearance distanceMore... |
| `DeleteMeasurementPoints[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to delete measurement points to avoid collisionsMore... |
| `DeleteUserSafePoints[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to delete user inserted safe points to improve pathMore... |
| `FacetTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance used for faceting the componentsMore... |
| `FinishAtSafePlane[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to finish at safe plane after last pathMore... |
| `ListOutput[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to generate a reportMore... |
| `MaxAngularIncrement[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the max angular incrementMore... |
| `MaxLengthIncrement[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the max length incrementMore... |
| `MoveMeasurementPoints[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to move measurement points to avoid collisionsMore... |
| `NewSensors[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to create new sensorsMore... |
| `ProbeRotationsAtSafePlane[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to do probe rotations at safe planeMore... |
| `SafePlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns or sets the safe planeMore... |
| `StartFromSafePlane[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to start from safe plane before first pathMore... |
| `TableRotationsAtSafePlane[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to do table rotations at safe planeMore... |
| `ToolChangesAtSafePlane[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to do tool changes at safe planeMore... |
| `TransitionsBetweenPaths[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to generate transition points between pathsMore... |
| `TransitionsWithinPaths[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to generate transition points within pathsMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |

## NXOpen.CAM.InspectionMoveBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a45480.html

Represents CMM Inspection Move Builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `LockMove(bool @lock)` | `unsafe void` | Set lock to prevent move parameters from being changed programmatically.More... |
| `SetParent(NXOpen.CAM.CAMObjectparent)` | `unsafe void` | Set parentMore... |
| `SetProbeAngles()` | `unsafe void` | Set default values for probe angles based on feature type.More... |
| `SetProbeTip()` | `unsafe void` | Set default probe tip based on preferred tip type and probe angles.More... |
| `SetSibling(NXOpen.CAM.CAMObjectsibling)` | `unsafe void` | Set siblingMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |

| `EditStartEndPoints()` | `unsafe void` | Modifies the start and end points for an inspection featureMore... |
| `InspectFeatures()` | `unsafe void` | Creates inspection paths for the selected feature geometryMore... |
| `ProcessGeometryGroup(bool add,NXOpen.CAM.CAMObject[] objects)` | `unsafe void` | Creates the toolpath and Inspection features and tolerances corresponding to the selected geometry groupMore... |

| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |

## NXOpen.CAM.InspectionPathPointBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a45524.html

Represents an inspection path point builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `Delete(int index)` | `unsafe void` | Delete an existing path pointMore... |
| `GetPointData(int index, outNXOpen.NXObjectpoint, out double angleA, out double angleB)` | `unsafe void` | Get the angles of an existing path pointMore... |
| `GetScanData(int index, out double scanSpeed, out double stepSize)` | `unsafe void` | Get the scan values of an existing path pointMore... |
| `ModifyData(int index,NXOpen.NXObjectpoint, double angleA, double angleB)` | `unsafe void` | Modify an existing path point, name changed if not uniqueMore... |

Represents the builder for a CMM Inspection Sensor

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetSensorTipIjk()` | `unsafe double []` | Get the sensor tip location vector coordinatesMore... |
| `GetSensorTipXyz()` | `unsafe double []` | Get the sensor tip location cartesian coordinatesMore... |
| `SetSensorTipIjk(double [] ijk)` | `unsafe void` | Set the sensor tip location vector coordinatesMore... |
| `SetSensorTipXyz(double [] xyz)` | `unsafe void` | Set the sensor tip location cartesian coordinatesMore... |
| `GetHoleAxisValues()` | `unsafe double []` | Get the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `SetHoleAxisValues(double [] holeAxis)` | `unsafe void` | Set the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemBuilder(string name)` | `unsafeNXOpen.TaggedObject` | Returns the customizable item builder for the given customizable item nameMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |

| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |

## NXOpen.CAM.InspectionTorusFeatureBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a45628.html

Represents a CMM Inspection Torus Feature builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `FlipAxisDirection()` | `unsafe void` | Flips the torus inspection feature axis direction vectorMore... |
| `UpdateParams()` | `unsafe void` | Updates torus inspection feature characteristic parameters based on selected geometryMore... |
| `GetHoleAxisValues()` | `unsafe double []` | Get the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `SetHoleAxisValues(double [] holeAxis)` | `unsafe void` | Set the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemBuilder(string name)` | `unsafeNXOpen.TaggedObject` | Returns the customizable item builder for the given customizable item nameMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AxisDirectionI[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the axis direction vector i componentMore... |
| `AxisDirectionJ[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the axis direction vector j componentMore... |
| `AxisDirectionK[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the axis direction vector k componentMore... |
| `CenterPointX[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the torus center point x coordinateMore... |
| `CenterPointY[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the torus center point y coordinateMore... |

Represents a MachineGroup Builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `RemoveKinematics()` | `unsafe void` | Removes the machine data from the CAM setup, but does not remove the machine part component from the CAM assemblyMore... |
| `RemoveMachine()` | `unsafe void` | Removes the machine part component from the CAM assembly and removes the machine data from the CAM setup.More... |
| `ReplaceMachine(NXOpen.CAM.MachineGroupBuilder.RetrieveToolPocketInformationretrieveFlag,NXOpen.CAM.NcmctPartMountingBuilderncmctPartMountingBuilder)` | `unsafe void` | Replaces the machine model part file in the CAM part.More... |
| `UpdateCamSetup(NXOpen.CAM.MachineGroupBuilder.RetrieveToolPocketInformationretrieveFlag,NXOpen.CAM.NcmctPartMountingBuilderncmctPartMountingBuilder)` | `unsafe void` | Adds machine model part file to the CAM part.More... |
| `UpdateToolPathTime()` | `unsafe void` | Recalculate tool path time and update the operation navigatorMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemBuilder(string name)` | `unsafeNXOpen.TaggedObject` | Returns the customizable item builder for the given customizable item nameMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `MachinePartOccurrence[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Assemblies.Component` | Returns or sets the Machine Part Occurrence This is only needed when the option assembly positioning is selected in Part Mounting Dialog and should be called before update cam setup.More... |
| `RapidFeed[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.InheritableFeedBuilder` | Returns the Rapid Feed RateMore... |
| `ToolChangeTime[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.InheritableDoubleBuilder` | Returns the Tool Change TimeMore... |
| `Description[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the descriptionMore... |
| `EndUdeSet[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.UdeSet` | Returns the end ude setMore... |
| `StartUdeSet[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.UdeSet` | Returns the start ude setMore... |
| `CycleEvent[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.Ude` | Returns the cycle eventMore... |
| `CycleTable[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.Cycle` | Returns the cycleMore... |
| `OptimizationMethod[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.ParamBuilder.OptimizationTypes` | Returns or sets the optim methodMore... |
| `TargetPocket[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.NCGroup` | Returns or sets the target pocketMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |

Represents an Export Tool Part Builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `AskR1ToolTipJunction(outNXOpen.NXObjectr1ToolTipJunction, out int r1ToolTipTrackingPoint)` | `unsafe void` | The r1 tool tip junction, applies for turning tools onlyMore... |
| `AskToolTipJunction(outNXOpen.NXObjecttoolTipJunction, out int toolTipTrackingPoint, out int toolTipRadiusId)` | `unsafe void` | The tool_tip_tracking_point, tool_tip_radius_id parameters apply for turning tools only.More... |
| `GetNumToolCutter()` | `unsafe int` | Get the number of tool cutter objectsMore... |
| `GetNumToolNonCuttingObjects()` | `unsafe int` | Get the number of the tool's non cutting geometry objectsMore... |

| `FeatureMoveUp()` | `unsafe void` | Moves up a feature from the inspected geometry listMore... |
| `FeatureRemove()` | `unsafe void` | Removes a feature from the inspected geometry listMore... |
| `GetInspectDirection()` | `unsafe double []` | Gets the inspect approach directionMore... |
| `InspectionCycleLock()` | `unsafe void` | Locks or unlocks the inspection cycleMore... |
| `InspectionDepthLock()` | `unsafe void` | Locks or unlocks the inspection depthMore... |
| `InspectionOffsetLock()` | `unsafe void` | Locks or unlocks the inspection offsetMore... |
| `ProbingParameters()` | `unsafe void` | Opens the probing parameters dialogMore... |
| `ProcessSelectedCycle()` | `unsafe void` | Gets the parameters for a probing cycleMore... |
| `ProcessSelectedGeometry()` | `unsafe void` | Finds the probing cycle and creates the motion to inspect selected geometryMore... |
| `SetInspectDirection(double [] direction)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the inspect approach directionMore... |
| `ShowGeometry()` | `unsafe void` | Displays the selected geometryMore... |

| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |

| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |

Represents a Opr Builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetHoleAxisValues()` | `unsafe double []` | Get the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `SetHoleAxisValues(double [] holeAxis)` | `unsafe void` | Set the Hole Axis valuesMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemBuilder(string name)` | `unsafeNXOpen.TaggedObject` | Returns the customizable item builder for the given customizable item nameMore... |
| `GetCustomizableItemNames()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the names for all customizable item idsMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

## NXOpen.CAM.PreprocessGeometryBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a46480.html

Represents a Preprocess Geometry Builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `Create(NXOpen.NXObjectobj, double tolerance,NXOpen.NXObjectvector)` | `unsafe void` | Create new facet bodyMore... |
| `CreateWithAngleTolerance(NXOpen.DisplayableObjectobj, double tolerance, double angularTolerance,NXOpen.Directionvector)` | `unsafe void` | Create new facet body with a specified angle toleranceMore... |
| `Delete(NXOpen.NXObjectobj)` | `unsafe void` | Delete one facet bodyMore... |
| `GetObjects(outNXOpen.NXObject[] solidBodies, outNXOpen.NXObject[] facetBodies)` | `unsafe void` | Get solid bodies and relevant facet bodiesMore... |
| `GetParameter(NXOpen.NXObjectobj, out double tolerance, outNXOpen.NXObjectvector)` | `unsafe void` | Get tolerance and vector of facet body which is gotten from relevant solid bodyMore... |
| `SetParameter(NXOpen.NXObjectobj, double tolerance,NXOpen.NXObjectvector)` | `unsafe void` | Set tolerance and vector for facet body which is gotten from relevant solid bodyMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `FixedVector[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Direction` | Returns or sets the default tool axis vectorMore... |
| `TriangleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the default triangle toleranceMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |


---

| `GetValue(outNXOpen.CaeObjectType.CaeSubTypecaeSubType, out int caeSubId)` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature` | The object being selected with CAE set object information.More... |
| `SetValue(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection,NXOpen.Viewview,NXOpen.Point3dpoint)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with the object's view and object's pointMore... |
| `SetValue(NXOpen.InferSnapType.SnapTypesnapType,NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection1,NXOpen.Viewview1,NXOpen.Point3dpoint1,NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection2,NXOpen.Viewview2,NXOpen.Point3dpoint2)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with the objects view and objects point and snap information.More... |
| `SetValue(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection,NXOpen.CaeObjectType.CaeSubTypecaeSubType, int caeSubId)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with CAE set object information.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

|--------|------|------|

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `Add(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature@object)` | `unsafe bool` | Adds an object to the listMore... |

| `Add(NXOpen.InferSnapType.SnapTypesnapType,NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection1,NXOpen.Viewview1,NXOpen.Point3dpoint1,NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection2,NXOpen.Viewview2,NXOpen.Point3dpoint2)` | `unsafe bool` | The object being selected with the objects view and objects point and snap information.More... |
| `Add(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection,NXOpen.CaeObjectType.CaeSubTypecaeSubType, int caeSubId)` | `unsafe bool` | The object being selected with CAE set object information.More... |
| `AddWithViews(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature[] objects,NXOpen.View[] views)` | `unsafe bool` | Adds a set of objects with views to the listMore... |
| `Clear()` | `unsafe void` | Removes all items from the list.More... |
| `Contains(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature@object)` | `unsafe bool` | Returns whether the specified object is already in the list or not.More... |
| `GetArray()` | `unsafeNXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature[]` | Returns the list of objects in the selection list.More... |
| `GetSelectObjectArray()` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectObject[]` | Returns the list of SelectObjects in the selection list.More... |
| `Remove(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature@object)` | `unsafe bool` | Remove specified object from list.More... |
| `Remove(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature@object,NXOpen.Viewview)` | `unsafe bool` | Remove specified object from list.More... |
| `Remove(NXOpen.InferSnapType.SnapTypesnapType,NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection1,NXOpen.Viewview1,NXOpen.Point3dpoint1,NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeatureselection2,NXOpen.Viewview2,NXOpen.Point3dpoint2)` | `unsafe bool` | Remove specified object from list.More... |
| `Remove(NXOpen.SelectionMethodinputSelectionMethod)` | `unsafe bool` | Removes the objects from a SelectionMethod from the listMore... |
| `RemoveArray(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature[] objects)` | `unsafe bool` | Remove specified objects from list.More... |
| `SetArray(NXOpen.CAM.CAMFeature[] objects)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the list of objects in the selection list.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |

| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |

| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
